data.name: cable cross-over variation
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulleys to chest height.
Step:2 Stand in the center of the cable machine with one foot in front of the other.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with your palms facing down and your arms extended out to the sides.
Step:4 Take a step forward, keeping your arms slightly bent.
Step:5 With a slight bend in your elbows, bring your hands together in front of your chest.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: isometric wipers
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back on a mat or bench.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, perpendicular to your body.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift both legs off the ground, keeping them together and straight.
Step:4 Slowly lower your legs to one side, aiming to touch the ground with your feet while maintaining control.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then use your core to lift your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time lowering your legs to the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: raise single arm push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, using your chest muscles to lift your body.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm extended.

data.name: dumbbell incline twisted flyes
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest, with your arms extended.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbells, rotate your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement.
Step:5 Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles together at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell decline hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: cable incline fly (on stability ball)
instructions: Step:1 Set up a stability ball at an incline angle.
Step:2 Attach the cable handles to the high pulleys of a cable machine.
Step:3 Sit on the stability ball facing away from the machine, with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:4 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:5 Lean forward slightly, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:6 With a controlled motion, bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:7 Continue the motion until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: push-up (bosu ball)
instructions: Step:1 Place the bosu ball on the ground with the flat side facing up.
Step:2 Position yourself in a push-up position with your hands on the outer edges of the bosu ball.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the bosu ball by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: cable decline press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Sit on the decline bench facing the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position them at chest level.
Step:4 Keep your feet flat on the ground and your back firmly against the bench.
Step:5 Exhale and push the handles away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the handles back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: barbell front raise and pullover
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a barbell with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and raise the barbell in front of you until it reaches shoulder height.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Next, lower the barbell behind your head, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then raise the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: barbell wide reverse grip bench press horizontal
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with a wide reverse grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in and your wrists straight. Focus on horizontal movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: barbell incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dynamic chest stretch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly bring your arms forward, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 10-30 seconds.
Step:6 Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: superman push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower your body, simultaneously lift your right arm and left leg off the ground, extending them straight out.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then lower your arm and leg back down while pushing yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time lifting your left arm and right leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: resistance band seated chest press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the resistance band handles in each hand, with your palms facing down and elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your arms forward, pushing the resistance band away from your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: smith incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell incline shoulder raise
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest the dumbbells on your thighs and lean back onto the bench.
Step:3 Use your thighs to help raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Exhale and slowly raise the dumbbells above your head, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: cable one arm incline press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back resting against an incline bench.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle in one hand and position your arm at a 90-degree angle with your elbow bent.
Step:3 Press the cable handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

data.name: smith incline reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: medicine ball chest push multiple response
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a medicine ball at chest level.
Step:2 Extend your arms forward, pushing the medicine ball away from your chest.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the medicine ball back to your chest.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: chest tap push-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell lying hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: cable decline fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the handles with your palms facing forward and your arms extended straight out in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, open your arms out to the sides in a controlled motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: kettlebell alternating press on floor
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a kettlebell in each hand, with your palms facing towards your feet and your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Lower one kettlebell down towards your shoulder while keeping the other kettlebell extended straight up.
Step:4 Press the lowered kettlebell back up to the starting position while simultaneously lowering the other kettlebell down towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Continue alternating the press motion with each kettlebell for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: cable bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to chest height and attach the handles.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and step forward to create tension in the cables.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and engage your core.
Step:5 Bend your elbows and bring your hands to shoulder level, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:6 Push the handles forward, extending your arms fully in front of you.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then slowly reverse the movement, bringing your hands back to shoulder level.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: roller seated shoulder flexor depresor retractor
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat surface with your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Hold the roller with both hands, palms facing down, and place it on your thighs.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and roll the roller away from your body, extending your arms straight in front of you.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly roll the roller back towards your body, bending your arms and bringing the roller back to your thighs.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
